verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc est quod possederunt filii Israël in terra Chanaan, quam dederunt eis Eleazar sacerdos, et Josue filius Nun, et principes familiarum per tribus Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה אֲשֶׁר־נָחֲל֥וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּאֶ֣רֶץ כְּנָ֑עַן אֲשֶׁ֨ר נִחֲל֜וּ אוֹתָ֗ם אֶלְעָזָ֤ר הַכֹּהֵן֙ וִיהוֹשֻׁ֣עַ בִּן־נ֔וּן וְרָאשֵׁ֛י אֲב֥וֹת הַמַּטּ֖וֹת לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is what the children of Israel possessed in the land of Chanaan, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the princes of the families by the tribes of Israel gave to them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät ovat ne mitkä Israelin lapset ovat perimiseksi saaneet Kanaanin maalla, jonka heille perinnöksi jakoi pappi Eleatsar ja Josua Nunin poika ja Israelin lasten sukukuntain ylimmäiset isät.
verses.king_james: And these are the countries which the children of Israel inherited in the land of Canaan, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, distributed for inheritance to them.

verses.latin_vulgate: sorte omnia dividentes, sicut præceperat Dominus in manu Moysi, novem tribubus, et dimidiæ tribui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּגוֹרַ֖ל נַחֲלָתָ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ בְּיַד־מֹשֶׁ֔ה לְתִשְׁעַ֥ת הַמַּטּ֖וֹת וַחֲצִ֥י הַמַּטֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Dividing all by lot, as the Lord had commanded the hand of Moses, to the nine tribes, and the half tribe.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he jakoivat sen heillensä arvalla, niinkuin Herra oli käskenyt Moseksen käden kautta, yhdeksälle sukukunnalle ja puolelle sukukunnalle.
verses.king_james: By lot was their inheritance, as the Lord commanded by the hand of Moses, for the nine tribes, and for the half tribe.

verses.latin_vulgate: Duabus enim tribubus, et dimidiæ, dederat Moyses trans Jordanem possessionem : absque Levitis, qui nihil terræ acceperunt inter fratres suos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־נָתַ֨ן מֹשֶׁ֜ה נַחֲלַ֨ת שְׁנֵ֤י הַמַּטּוֹת֙ וַחֲצִ֣י הַמַּטֶּ֔ה מֵעֵ֖בֶר לַיַּרְדֵּ֑ן וְלַ֨לְוִיִּ֔ם לֹא־נָתַ֥ן נַחֲלָ֖ה בְּתוֹכָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For to two tribes and a half Moses had given possession beyond the Jordan: besides the Levites, who received no land among their brethren:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Moses oli antanut puolelle kolmatta sukukunnalle perimisen tuolla puolella Jordania. Mutta Leviläisille ei hän antanut yhtään perimistä heidän seassansa.
verses.king_james: For Moses had given the inheritance of two tribes and an half tribe on the other side Jordan: but unto the Levites he gave none inheritance among them.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed in eorum successerunt locum filii Joseph in duas divisi tribus, Manasse et Ephraim : nec acceperunt Levitæ aliam in terra partem, nisi urbes ad habitandum, et suburbana earum ad alenda jumenta et pecora sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הָי֧וּ בְנֵֽי־יוֹסֵ֛ף שְׁנֵ֥י מַטּ֖וֹת מְנַשֶּׁ֣ה וְאֶפְרָ֑יִם וְלֹֽא־נָתְנוּ֩ חֵ֨לֶק לַלְוִיִּ֜ם בָּאָ֗רֶץ כִּ֤י אִם־עָרִים֙ לָשֶׁ֔בֶת וּמִ֨גְרְשֵׁיהֶ֔ם לְמִקְנֵיהֶ֖ם וּלְקִנְיָנָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But in their place succeeded the children of Joseph divided into two tribes, of Manasses and Ephraim: neither did the Levites receive other portion of land, but cities to dwell in, and their suburbs to feed their beasts and flocks.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Josephin lasten oli kaksi sukukuntaa, Manasse ja Ephraim; sentähden ei he Leviläisille yhtään osaa antaneet maakunnassa, vaan kaupungit heidän asuaksensa, ja esikaupungit, joissa heidän karjansa ja kalunsa oleman piti.
verses.king_james: For the children of Joseph were two tribes, Manasseh and Ephraim: therefore they gave no part unto the Levites in the land, save cities to dwell in, with their suburbs for their cattle and for their substance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut præceperat Dominus Moysi, ita fecerunt filii Israël, et diviserunt terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֔ה כֵּ֥ן עָשׂ֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַֽיַּחְלְק֖וּ אֶת־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: As the Lord had commanded Moses so did the children of Israel, and they divided the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin Herra oli Mosekselle käskenyt, niin tekivät Israelin lapset, ja jakoivat maakunnan.
verses.king_james: As the Lord commanded Moses, so the children of Israel did, and they divided the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accesserunt itaque filii Juda ad Josue in Galgala, locutusque est ad eum Caleb filius Jephone Cenezæus : Nosti quid locutus sit Dominus ad Moysen hominem Dei de me et te in Cadesbarne.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּגְּשׁ֨וּ בְנֵי־יְהוּדָ֤ה אֶל־יְהוֹשֻׁ֙עַ֙ בַּגִּלְגָּ֔ל וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֔יו כָּלֵ֥ב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּ֖ה הַקְּנִזִּ֑י אַתָּ֣ה יָדַ֡עְתָּ אֶֽת־הַדָּבָר֩ אֲשֶׁר־דִּבֶּ֨ר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֣ה אִישׁ־הָאֱלֹהִ֗ים עַ֧ל אֹדוֹתַ֛י וְעַ֥ל אֹדוֹתֶ֖יךָ בְּקָדֵ֥שׁ בַּרְנֵֽעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the children of Juda came to Joshua in Galgal, and Caleb the son of Jephone the Cenezite spoke to him: Thou knowest what the Lord spoke to Moses the man of God concerning me and thee in Cadesbarne.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin menivät Juudan lapset Josuan tykö Gilgalissa, ja Kaleb Jephunnen poika Kenisiläinen sanoi hänelle: sinä tiedät, mitä Herra sanoi Jumalan miehelle Mosekselle minun ja sinun puolestas KadesBarneassa.
verses.king_james: Then the children of Judah came unto Joshua in Gilgal: and Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite said unto him, Thou knowest the thing that the Lord said unto Moses the man of God concerning me and thee in Kadesh–barnea.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quadraginta annorum eram quando misit me Moyses famulus Domini de Cadesbarne, ut considerarem terram, nuntiavique ei quod mihi verum videbatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אַרְבָּעִ֨ים שָׁנָ֜ה אָנֹכִ֗י בִּ֠שְׁלֹ֠חַ מֹשֶׁ֨ה עֶבֶד־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֹתִ֛י מִקָּדֵ֥שׁ בַּרְנֵ֖עַ לְרַגֵּ֣ל אֶת־הָאָ֑רֶץ וָאָשֵׁ֤ב אֹתוֹ֙ דָּבָ֔ר כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר עִם־לְֽבָבִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I was forty years old when Moses the servant of the Lord sent me from Cadesbarne, to view the land, and I brought him word again as to me seemed true,
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olin neljänkymmenen ajastaikainen, kuin Moses Herran palvelia minun lähetti KadesBarneasta vakoomaan maata, ja minä sanoin hänelle jälleen vastauksen sydämeni jälkeen.
verses.king_james: Forty years old was I when Moses the servant of the Lord sent me from Kadesh–barnea to espy out the land; and I brought him word again as it was in mine heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fratres autem mei, qui ascenderant mecum, dissolverunt cor populi : et nihilominus ego secutus sum Dominum Deum meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחַי֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָל֣וּ עִמִּ֔י הִמְסִ֖יו אֶת־לֵ֣ב הָעָ֑ם וְאָנֹכִ֣י מִלֵּ֔אתִי אַחֲרֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But my brethren, that had gone up with me, discouraged the heart of the people: and I nevertheless followed the Lord my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta veljeni, jotka minun kanssani menneet olivat, saattivat kansalle vapisevaisen sydämen; mutta minä seurasin Herraa minun Jumalaani uskollisesti.
verses.king_james: Nevertheless my brethren that went up with me made the heart of the people melt: but I wholly followed the Lord my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juravitque Moyses in die illo, dicens : Terra, quam calcavit pes tuus, erit possessio tua, et filiorum tuorum in æternum : quia secutus es Dominum Deum meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשָּׁבַ֣ע מֹשֶׁ֗ה בַּיּ֣וֹם הַהוּא֮ לֵאמֹר֒ אִם־לֹ֗א הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ אֲשֶׁ֨ר דָּרְכָ֤ה רַגְלְךָ֙ בָּ֔הּ לְךָ֨ תִהְיֶ֧ה לְנַחֲלָ֛ה וּלְבָנֶ֖יךָ עַד־עוֹלָ֑ם כִּ֣י מִלֵּ֔אתָ אַחֲרֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses swore in that day, saying: The land which thy foot hath trodden upon shall be thy possession, and thy children for ever, because thou hast followed the Lord my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses vannoi sinä päivänä ja sanoi: se maa, jonka päälle sinä jaloillas olet astunut, on sinun ja sinun lastes perittävä ijankaikkisesti, ettäs Herraa minun Jumalaani uskollisesti seurannut olet.
verses.king_james: And Moses sware on that day, saying, Surely the land whereon thy feet have trodden shall be thine inheritance, and thy children’s for ever, because thou hast wholly followed the Lord my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Concessit ergo Dominus vitam mihi, sicut pollicitus est, usque in præsentem diem. Quadraginta et quinque anni sunt, ex quo locutus est Dominus verbum istud ad Moysen, quando ambulabat Israël per solitudinem : hodie octoginta quinque annorum sum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה הִנֵּה֩ הֶחֱיָ֨ה יְהֹוָ֥ה ׀ אוֹתִי֮ כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבֵּר֒ זֶה֩ אַרְבָּעִ֨ים וְחָמֵ֜שׁ שָׁנָ֗ה מֵ֠אָ֠ז דִּבֶּ֨ר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶת־הַדָּבָ֤ר הַזֶּה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־הָלַ֥ךְ יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר וְעַתָּה֙ הִנֵּ֣ה אָנֹכִ֣י הַיּ֔וֹם בֶּן־חָמֵ֥שׁ וּשְׁמֹנִ֖ים שָׁנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord therefore hath granted me life, as he promised until this present day, It is forty and five years since the Lord spoke this word to Moses, when Israel journeyed through the wilderness: this day I am eighty-five years old,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nyt katso, Herra on antanut minun elää, niinkuin hän sanonut oli. Tämä on viides ajastaika viidettäkymmentä sittekuin Herra näitä sanoi Mosekselle, kuin Israel vaelsi korvessa. Ja katso, minä olen tänäpäivänä viiden ajastajan vanha yhdeksättäkymmentä,
verses.king_james: And now, behold, the Lord hath kept me alive, as he said, these forty and five years, even since the Lord spake this word unto Moses, while the children of Israel wandered in the wilderness: and now, lo, I am this day fourscore and five years old.

verses.latin_vulgate: sic valens ut eo valebam tempore quando ad explorandum missus sum : illius in me temporis fortitudo usque hodie perseverat, tam ad bellandum quam ad gradiendum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עוֹדֶ֨נִּי הַיּ֜וֹם חָזָ֗ק כַּֽאֲשֶׁר֙ בְּי֨וֹם שְׁלֹ֤חַ אוֹתִי֙ מֹשֶׁ֔ה כְּכֹ֥חִי אָ֖ז וּכְכֹ֣חִי עָ֑תָּה לַמִּלְחָמָ֖ה וְלָצֵ֥את וְלָבֽוֹא׃
verses.douay_rheims: As strong as I was at that time when I was sent to view the land: the strength of that time continueth in me until this day, as well to fight as to march.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olen vielä tänäpäivänä niin väkevä, kuin minä sinä päivänä olin, jona Mosen minun lähetti; niinkuin väkevyyteni oli siihen aikaan, niin on se vielä nyt vahva sotimaan, käymään ulos ja sisälle.
verses.king_james: As yet I am as strong this day as I was in the day that Moses sent me: as my strength was then, even so is my strength now, for war, both to go out, and to come in.

verses.latin_vulgate: Da ergo mihi montem istum, quem pollicitus est Dominus, te quoque audiente, in quo Enacim sunt, et urbes magnæ atque munitæ : si forte sit Dominus mecum, et potuero delere eos, sicut promisit mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה תְּנָה־לִּי֙ אֶת־הָהָ֣ר הַזֶּ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא כִּ֣י אַתָּֽה־שָׁמַ֩עְתָּ֩ בַיּ֨וֹם הַה֜וּא כִּֽי־עֲנָקִ֣ים שָׁ֗ם וְעָרִים֙ גְּדֹל֣וֹת בְּצֻר֔וֹת אוּלַ֨י יְהֹוָ֤ה אוֹתִי֙ וְה֣וֹרַשְׁתִּ֔ים כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Give me therefore this mountain, which the Lord promised, in thy hearing also, wherein are the Enacims, and cities great and strong: if so be the Lord will be with me, and I shall be able to destroy them, as he promised me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin anna nyt minulle tämä vuori, josta Herra sanoi sinä päivänä, sillä sinä kuulit sen siihen aikaan. Ja Enakilaiset asuvat siellä, ja siellä ovat suuret ja vahvat kaupungit; jos Herra on minun kanssani, että minä ajaisin heidät pois, niinkuin Herra on sanonut.
verses.king_james: Now therefore give me this mountain, whereof the Lord spake in that day; for thou heardest in that day how the Anakims were there, and that the cities were great and fenced: if so be the Lord will be with me, then I shall be able to drive them out, as the Lord said.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedixitque ei Josue, et tradidit ei Hebron in possessionem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְבָרְכֵ֖הוּ יְהוֹשֻׁ֑עַ וַיִּתֵּ֧ן אֶת־חֶבְר֛וֹן לְכָלֵ֥ב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּ֖ה לְנַחֲלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joshua blessed him, and gave him Hebron in possession.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua siunasi häntä ja antoi Kalebille Jephunnen pojalle Hebronin perimiseksi.
verses.king_james: And Joshua blessed him, and gave unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh Hebron for an inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: atque ex eo fuit Hebron Caleb filio Jephone Cenezæo usque in præsentem diem, quia secutus est Dominum Deum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֣ן הָיְתָֽה־חֶ֠בְר֠וֹן לְכָלֵ֨ב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּ֤ה הַקְּנִזִּי֙ לְֽנַחֲלָ֔ה עַ֖ד הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה יַ֚עַן אֲשֶׁ֣ר מִלֵּ֔א אַחֲרֵ֕י יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And from that time Hebron belonged to Caleb the son of Jephone the Cenezite, until this present day: because he followed the Lord the God of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siitä oli Hebron Kalebin Jephunnen pojan Kenisiläisen perimys tähän päivään asti, että hän on uskollisesti seurannut Herraa Israelin Jumalaa.
verses.king_james: Hebron therefore became the inheritance of Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite unto this day, because that he wholly followed the Lord God of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nomen Hebron ante vocabatur Cariath Arbe : Adam maximus ibi inter Enacim situs est : et terra cessavit a præliis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשֵׁ֨ם חֶבְר֤וֹן לְפָנִים֙ קִרְיַ֣ת אַרְבַּ֔ע הָאָדָ֧ם הַגָּד֛וֹל בָּעֲנָקִ֖ים ה֑וּא וְהָאָ֥רֶץ שָֽׁקְטָ֖ה מִמִּלְחָמָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The name of Hebron before was called Cariath-Arbe: Adam the greatest among the Enacims was laid there and the land rested from wars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Hebron kutsuttiin muinaiseen aikaan KirjatArba, joka oli suurin mies Enakilaisten seassa; ja maakunta lakkasi sotimasta.
verses.king_james: And the name of Hebron before was Kirjath–arba; which Arba was a great man among the Anakims. And the land had rest from war.
